g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the input image look like entering ConvNeXtUNet?')
sendPrompt('What does ConvNeXt Stage 1 produce and why is it good at low-level texture?')
sendPrompt('What does ConvNeXt Stage 2 detect at 64x64?')
sendPrompt('What does ConvNeXt Stage 3 detect at 32x32?')
sendPrompt('What does ConvNeXt Stage 4 produce at the deepest level?')
sendPrompt('What does the bottleneck do and why is it placed between encoder and decoder?')
sendPrompt('How does dec3 upsample and concatenate with the f3 skip connection?')
sendPrompt('How does dec2 upsample and concatenate with the f2 skip connection?')
sendPrompt('How does dec1 upsample and concatenate with the f1 skip connection?')
